feed.title: kingasix TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from kingasix

entry.title: This has to be one of my favorite features in any game! Forget petting the pups! Can you pick it up and carry it!?! #asixverse #retrogaming #blerd #gaming #zelda
entry.content: This has to be one of my favorite features in any game! Forget petting the pups! Can you pick it up and carry it!?! #asixverse #retrogaming #blerd #gaming #zelda

entry.title: I was just singing out about money and lightning lamps when this tile centipede flipped and dipped me. Its the little things ya know. #asixverse #retrogaming #blerd #gaming #zelda
entry.content: I was just singing out about money and lightning lamps when this tile centipede flipped and dipped me. Its the little things ya know. #asixverse #retrogaming #blerd #gaming #zelda

entry.title: I didn’t realize the bridges could turn on their own and assume I could make that jump… I felt kinda bamboozled but I’m having fun. 😅 #asixverse #retrogaming #blerd #gaming #zelda
entry.content: I didn’t realize the bridges could turn on their own and assume I could make that jump… I felt kinda bamboozled but I’m having fun. 😅 #asixverse #retrogaming #blerd #gaming #zelda

entry.title: Sunday seems like a good day for a throwback so how about this one time this guard tried to get outta saving his coworkers with me. He was gonna earn that paycheck today… Though I don’t think he made it lol. #asixverse #throwback #blerd #oblivion #gaming
entry.content: Sunday seems like a good day for a throwback so how about this one time this guard tried to get outta saving his coworkers with me. He was gonna earn that paycheck today… Though I don’t think he made it lol. #asixverse #throwback #blerd #oblivion #gaming

entry.title: This was a pretty fun mini boss. I hit a smooth spin move on the deku baba while handling my business. Gotta do it with style. 😏 #asixverse #gaming #zelda #blerd #retrogaming
entry.content: This was a pretty fun mini boss. I hit a smooth spin move on the deku baba while handling my business. Gotta do it with style. 😏 #asixverse #gaming #zelda #blerd #retrogaming

entry.title: #duet with @8bit_Bonello Gaming Come on! Gotta make this a bit harder! Grew up on most of these games. #GamingOnTikTok #Asixverse #retrogaming #blerd
entry.content: #duet with @8bit_Bonello Gaming Come on! Gotta make this a bit harder! Grew up on most of these games. #GamingOnTikTok #Asixverse #retrogaming #blerd

entry.title: Nintendo wild for this mini boss but if you put it out there then I am obliged to tear it up and tear it up I did. 😏 #asixverse #zelda #gaming #blerd #retrogaming
entry.content: Nintendo wild for this mini boss but if you put it out there then I am obliged to tear it up and tear it up I did. 😏 #asixverse #zelda #gaming #blerd #retrogaming

entry.title: Needed bombs for the big boss and look who came to help… Big booty monkey coming to repay the favor! #asixverse #zelda #gaming #blerd #retrogaming
entry.content: Needed bombs for the big boss and look who came to help… Big booty monkey coming to repay the favor! #asixverse #zelda #gaming #blerd #retrogaming

entry.title: The game tasked me to light some torches as Wolf Link but as I was asking how the game immediately answered me. Love to see it 😅 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #gaming #retrogaming
entry.content: The game tasked me to light some torches as Wolf Link but as I was asking how the game immediately answered me. Love to see it 😅 #asixverse #zelda #blerd #gaming #retrogaming

entry.title: I like the little sumo mini game in Twilight Princess. That belly slap had me rolling though lmao 🤣 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #blerd #gaming
entry.content: I like the little sumo mini game in Twilight Princess. That belly slap had me rolling though lmao 🤣 #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #blerd #gaming

entry.title: Beth was tryna get isekai’ed or whatever. Reincarnated as a like like looking a**… Thank god Colin came in with the assist. #asixverse #retrogaming #zelda #blerd #gaming
entry.content: Beth was tryna get isekai’ed or whatever. Reincarnated as a like like looking a**… Thank god Colin came in with the assist. #asixverse #retrogaming #zelda #blerd #gaming

entry.title: Big Boss Bokoblin need to his grunts how to aim. They just out here wasting arrows and fire. He probably would of gotten off with Colin if they could land a hit. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming
entry.content: Big Boss Bokoblin need to his grunts how to aim. They just out here wasting arrows and fire. He probably would of gotten off with Colin if they could land a hit. #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming

entry.title: Link knows he’s that dude. He couldn’t resist hitting that pose after knocking off Big Boss Bokoblin. Also the series needs more horse fights! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Link knows he’s that dude. He couldn’t resist hitting that pose after knocking off Big Boss Bokoblin. Also the series needs more horse fights! #asixverse #zelda #blerd #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Yall know I had to go check up on the pups. Yall thought I was playing… Until I finish that mod, I will be making frequent visits. Hopefully we can go see him on my stream later tonight! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Yall know I had to go check up on the pups. Yall thought I was playing… Until I finish that mod, I will be making frequent visits. Hopefully we can go see him on my stream later tonight! #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: Gorons are mad aggressive in Twilight Princess but also funny as hell. They out here doing Street Fighter 2 death cries and using rollout. I had fun. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming
entry.content: Gorons are mad aggressive in Twilight Princess but also funny as hell. They out here doing Street Fighter 2 death cries and using rollout. I had fun. #asixverse #blerd #zelda #retrogaming #gaming

entry.title: I see why they call it Death Mountain because everyone and everything wants Link dead… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: I see why they call it Death Mountain because everyone and everything wants Link dead… #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: Death Mountain hot springs got the gorons feeling all pacifistic. It’s pretty ironic how cool the hot springs makes them. 😂 ##asixverse##retrogaming##gaming##zelda##blerd
entry.content: Death Mountain hot springs got the gorons feeling all pacifistic. It’s pretty ironic how cool the hot springs makes them. 😂 ##asixverse##retrogaming##gaming##zelda##blerd

entry.title: I apologize for thinking this old Elder Goron wasn’t on much. I thought I was just gonna get an easy win and be on my mary way…. Had fun though. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: I apologize for thinking this old Elder Goron wasn’t on much. I thought I was just gonna get an easy win and be on my mary way…. Had fun though. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Finally made it to the second dungeon and was greeted with a nice little fight and I love kicking butt! 😈 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Finally made it to the second dungeon and was greeted with a nice little fight and I love kicking butt! 😈 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: If Im gonna be playing with the PC port I might as well take advantage of the features. I didn’t leave it on but fast iron boots is silly but fun. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: If Im gonna be playing with the PC port I might as well take advantage of the features. I didn’t leave it on but fast iron boots is silly but fun. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: These bokoblins could use some aim assist but then again who am I to talk lol? I was missing a fair amount of shots myself. 😅 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: These bokoblins could use some aim assist but then again who am I to talk lol? I was missing a fair amount of shots myself. 😅 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Talking Zelda music while tossing this goron in this lava. What’s Zelda OST gets you bobbing your head? #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Talking Zelda music while tossing this goron in this lava. What’s Zelda OST gets you bobbing your head? #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Forgot to get the other shield and didn’t feel like going back to get it. To be honest, I am surprised the shield made it this far. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Forgot to get the other shield and didn’t feel like going back to get it. To be honest, I am surprised the shield made it this far. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: I really enjoyed this dungeon. Fire temple and Death Mountain was fun! Now we got 2 of the 3 fused shadows so onward to the next! #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: I really enjoyed this dungeon. Fire temple and Death Mountain was fun! Now we got 2 of the 3 fused shadows so onward to the next! #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: It took me a minute but I had fun restoring Lake Hylia from the twilight. The mini boss fight was unexpected and nice. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: It took me a minute but I had fun restoring Lake Hylia from the twilight. The mini boss fight was unexpected and nice. #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Link done got himself hakai’ed and now he out here dying like Sackboy. Crazy world we live in… #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Link done got himself hakai’ed and now he out here dying like Sackboy. Crazy world we live in… #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: It’s crazy how Nintendo has never revisited the idea of a previous Link teaching the current one. Its so cool and fun! #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: It’s crazy how Nintendo has never revisited the idea of a previous Link teaching the current one. Its so cool and fun! #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Bulblins kidnapped Lila so good they snatched her memories. Link looked kinda hurt that he was forgotten. #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: Bulblins kidnapped Lila so good they snatched her memories. Link looked kinda hurt that he was forgotten. #asixverse #gaming #retrogaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: This scene was pretty funny. I actually thought the guards was gonna help but they got the hell up outta there. Really wild for that lmao 😂😂😂 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd
entry.content: This scene was pretty funny. I actually thought the guards was gonna help but they got the hell up outta there. Really wild for that lmao 😂😂😂 #asixverse #retrogaming #gaming #zelda #blerd

entry.title: Had just enough arrows to take round two against King Bulblin and got Lila and the Zora Prince to Kakariko Village. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd
entry.content: Had just enough arrows to take round two against King Bulblin and got Lila and the Zora Prince to Kakariko Village. #asixverse #zelda #retrogaming #gaming #blerd

entry.title: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio
entry.content: I was about to be grieving real differently if not for git. Good thing I’m not new to this… 😅 #fyp #indiegames #gamedev #gbstudio

entry.title: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights
entry.content: I should've left that damn box alone because now I'm missing a chuck of my ass, and it got me all in caution. Crow Country was a helluva a time... just be cautious. #crowcountry #indiegames #livehighlights

entry.title: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
entry.content: Seen a lot of discourse from the anti-melanin folks about how they take showers and while I think yall playing its nice to see these type of showers are available in Cyberpunk 2077… But seriously yall use soap and wash cloths, right….?
